cells.rationale: Subtle provenance-discriminator correctness invariant (must cover resolver/deconflict/repair, not the plan_verb whitelist) plus a contract-shaped flip of a shipped default that HELP/AGENT_HELP/board-scope byte-identity all depend on.
Bounded, well-specified stderr-only heartbeat feature over a named timer seam and sanitized emitter with no stdout-contract change, squarely the sonnet-workhorse sweet spot.
Small multi-file probe feature riding the existing first-paint eval pass with a fully-specified acceptance and a mechanical exit-registry/descriptor lockstep, no intelligence-bound reason for opus.

Measure-then-fix with the dominant cost suspects already named and the fix a known adaptive-backoff (grow/reset/cap) pattern pinned by pure-function tests, so hypothesis is guided rather than open-ended.
Docs revise-and-consolidate cross-checked against the shipped CLI with lint gates as acceptance, mechanical single-surface work in the lower band.
